seed_problem: seed spec fsx_S_0999 (day-night-laplacian / edge-schedule-partition + floquet-multiplier + non-commutativity-exploit)
mutation: composite: goal is a graded MIN of a Floquet (product-of-exponentials) spectral radius instead of any decision property, and the input is generalized to an edge-labeled multigraph-like weighted graph whose edge set must be scheduled (partitioned with per-shift caps) into two non-commuting diffusion operators
theme: alternating two courier networks between day and night shifts
title: Day-Night Courier Laplacians
strategies: trivial: prefix-fill day up to cap in input order, overflow to night
greedy: blind hill-climbing local search (random single-edge day<->night swaps) against an internal Floquet-radius estimate -- converges to a 'balanced half graph' for each shift

strong: local search augmented with node-block consolidation moves (move a whole hub's incident edges onto whichever shift already holds more of them), discovering edge-disjoint substructures that keep a slow-subspace-killing pairing coherent across shifts
invalid: dumps every edge into the day shift, violating capDay
